prompt_en: pixel art icon, 64x64, minimalist dark fantasy, training dummy or combat stance symbol, wooden practice dummy or crossed staves motif, charcoal background (#1a1a24), neon cyan accents (#00d9ff), clean silhouette, high contrast, 16-32bit inspired, atmospheric, muted dark palette, sharp crisp pixels, no blur, centered composition, martial energy
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, photorealistic, 3D render, soft edges, realistic textures, too detailed, text overlay, multiple colors, oversaturated, swords crossed (explicitly avoid), cluttered background, illegible, anthropomorphic features
style_notes: Combat/training button icon. Emphasizes practice and martial training without showing weapons directly (per user request to avoid swords). Uses cyan accent on dark background. Sharp pixel art for 64x64 scale.
